heading: Help us fix issues faster
description: Your report creates a GitHub issue for maintainers to triage.
safetyWarning: Keep this report public-safe. Do not include personal information, email addresses, phone numbers, home/work addresses, or account secrets.
stepsPlaceholder:
1. Open the app
2. Tap ...
3. See error
screenshotsPlaceholder: Paste links to screenshots, videos, or cloud files
errorApi404: Bug report API is unavailable in this environment. If you are testing locally, use the deployed site to submit.
errorApi403: This origin is not allowed to submit bug reports. Please check APP_ORIGINS in your backend environment.
errorApi500: Bug report service is not configured yet. Please confirm GitHub token and repo environment variables.
errorApi502: GitHub issue creation failed upstream. Please try again in a minute.
errorApiGeneric: We could not submit your bug report right now (HTTP {{status}}).
errorNetwork: Network error while submitting bug report. Please check your connection and try again.
successMessage: Issue #{{number}} was created successfully and is ready for maintainer triage.
